inYourCart.description: Heading on the cart page indicating the items currently in the user's cart.

yourCartIsEmpty.description: Empty-state title shown when the cart has no items.

emptyCartHint.description: Empty-state body prompting the user to add domains to the cart to get started.

browseDomains.description: Button on the empty cart that navigates to the domain browse/search page.

clearCart.description: Button to remove all items from the cart.

clearCartDialog.title.description: Title of the confirmation dialog shown before clearing the cart.

clearCartDialog.description.description: Body of the clear-cart confirmation dialog explaining that all items will be removed.

clearCartDialog.cancel.description: Cancel button in the clear-cart confirmation dialog.

errorDialog.title.description: Title of the dialog shown when order submission fails unexpectedly.

errorDialog.description.description: Body of the error dialog reassuring the user they won't be charged and inviting a retry.

errorDialog.errorDetail.description: Technical error detail line shown in the error dialog. {message} is the raw error message — keep untranslated; keep the surrounding parentheses and 'Error -' prefix.

errorDialog.close.description: Close button in the order-error dialog.

errorDialog.tryAgain.description: Retry button in the order-error dialog.

cartChanges.title.description: Title of the notice shown when the cart contents changed (e.g. price or availability updates).

cartChanges.description.description: Body of the cart-changes notice indicating some changes were made to the cart.

cartChanges.dismiss.description: Dismiss button for the cart-changes notice.

submitButton.selectNftWallet.description: Submit-button label prompting the user to select an NFT wallet before continuing.

submitButton.selectPaymentMethod.description: Submit-button label prompting the user to select a payment method before continuing.

submitButton.processing.description: Submit-button loading label while the order is being processed.

submitButton.submitOrder.description: Primary submit button to place the order.

disabledReason.cartUpdating.description: Reason text explaining the submit button is disabled because the cart is still updating.

disabledReason.acceptRequirements.description: Reason text explaining the user must review and accept the registration requirements on their cart items.

disabledReason.finishSplittingPayment.description: Reason text explaining the user must finish splitting their payment to continue.

disabledReason.selectWallet.description: Reason text explaining the user must select a wallet to receive their domains.

disabledReason.confirmWallet.description: Reason text explaining the user must confirm the wallet that will receive their domains.

disabledReason.selectPaymentMethod.description: Reason text explaining the user must select a payment method.

skeleton.selectNftWallet.description: Placeholder label shown in the loading skeleton for the NFT wallet selector.

skeleton.paymentMethod.description: Placeholder label shown in the loading skeleton for the payment method selector.

addFromUrl.cart.description: Breadcrumb/label for the cart on the add-domains-from-URL flow page.

addFromUrl.heading.description: Heading on the add-domains-from-URL page while domains are added to the cart.

addFromUrl.subheading.description: Subheading on the add-domains-from-URL page asking the user to wait while domains are validated and loaded.

addFromUrl.domainsRequested.description: Label preceding the list/count of domains requested in the add-from-URL flow.

addFromUrl.steps.parse.description: Progress step label for validating the requested domains.

addFromUrl.steps.fetch.description: Progress step label for checking domain availability.

addFromUrl.steps.add.description: Progress step label for adding domains to the cart.

addFromUrl.steps.redirect.description: Progress step label for redirecting the user to their cart.

addFromUrl.detail.added.description: Per-domain status badge in the add-from-URL flow: the domain was added to the cart.

addFromUrl.detail.readyToAdd.description: Per-domain status badge in the add-from-URL flow: the domain is ready to be added.

addFromUrl.detail.alreadyInCart.description: Per-domain status badge in the add-from-URL flow: the domain is already in the cart.

addFromUrl.detail.requiresTransferCode.description: Per-domain status badge in the add-from-URL flow: the domain requires a transfer/auth code.

addFromUrl.detail.unsupported.description: Per-domain status badge in the add-from-URL flow: the domain is unsupported or unavailable.

addFromUrl.detail.invalid.description: Per-domain status badge in the add-from-URL flow: the domain entry is invalid.

addFromUrl.confirm.addingToCart.description: Loading label on the confirm button while domains are being added to the cart.

addFromUrl.confirm.tryAgain.description: Retry button in the add-from-URL confirm step.

addFromUrl.confirm.addToCart.description: Confirm button to add the listed domains to the cart.

addFromUrl.confirm.reviewHelper.description: Helper text prompting the user to review the details above before confirming.

addFromUrl.confirm.noRegistrableHelper.description: Helper text shown when no registrable domains were found to add.

addFromUrl.redirecting.description: Status text shown while redirecting the user to their cart.

addFromUrl.errors.noDomains.description: Error message shown when no domains were provided in the add-from-URL flow.

addFromUrl.errors.validationFailed.description: Error message shown when domain validation failed in the add-from-URL flow.

addFromUrl.errors.addFailed.description: Error message shown when adding domains to the cart failed in the add-from-URL flow.

floatingCart.itemCount.description: Item-count label in the floating cart. ICU plural on {count}: 'one' = 'item', 'other' = 'items' (the number is rendered separately).

floatingCart.cartTotal.description: Label for the cart total amount in the floating cart.

floatingCart.domainsReadyToImport.description: Label in the floating cart noting domains ready to import. ICU plural on {count}: 'one' = 'domain', 'other' = 'domains' (the number is rendered separately).

floatingCart.addAll.description: Button in the floating cart to add all ready domains.

floatingCart.addToCart.description: Button in the floating cart to add the item to the cart.

floatingCart.checkout.description: Button in the floating cart to proceed to checkout.

submitErrors.x402Disabled.description: Error message shown when x402 payment is currently disabled. 'x402' is a payment protocol name — keep as-is.

submitErrors.x402Unavailable.description: Error message shown when x402 payment is not available right now. 'x402' is a payment protocol name — keep as-is.

submitErrors.x402ConnectWallet.description: Error message prompting the user to connect an active wallet to sign their x402 payment. 'x402' is a payment protocol name — keep as-is.

submitErrors.orderFailed.description: Generic error message shown when the order could not be submitted, inviting a retry.
